name: pdf_financial_statement_05
description: HOA financial statement PDF with dates and amounts - negative test (no events)

input.subject: Your Walnut Heights Statement
input.snippet: Your most recent statement is attached
input.body_text:
Dear Homeowner,

Your most recent statement is attached for your records.

If you have any questions about your account, please contact our billing department.

Thank you,
Walnut Heights HOA Management

notes: PDF has dates and dollar amounts but no calendar events. Tests that financial docs are not mistaken for events.
